text.title: Monorepo with Turborepo Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema for the artefact this methodology produces. The validator script enforces this contract before the artefact is accepted.

example.note: workspace_root empty, package_count below minimum, floating_versions and tasks_without_outputs above 0, missing required fields.

forbidden.pattern: Mixed package manager lockfiles (package-lock.json + yarn.lock + pnpm-lock.yaml)
Task in turbo.json without dependsOn or outputs declared
Floating version range in any workspace package.json
Root script that invokes a per-package command directly bypassing turbo

allowed-transformations.transformation: Normalise pnpm-workspace.yaml to alphabetical packages list.
Default remote_cache_in_ci to false when omitted (forces explicit confirmation).
